name: SCM Master POC 2 — Demand Forecast → Dynamic Reorder

nodes.name: Usage Signals
nodes.notes: Stands in for the usage history a forecast learns from. z=1.645 ≈ 95% service level. No personal data.

nodes.name: Forecast + Reorder Point (no AI)
nodes.notes: The core deterministic engine: service-level safety stock and a reorder point that adapts as lead time moves — the exact failure mode (static reorder points) the use case targets.

nodes.name: Claude — Reliability Note (AI)
nodes.notes: AI ADVISES on reliability — it narrates OVER the computed numbers, never recomputes them. Needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

nodes.name: Combine (numbers + AI note)
nodes.notes: Final output: the deterministic reorder decision + the AI's one-line reliability flag. The number is code's; the framing is the AI's.
